channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Fred again.. Discouraged Phone Use On His USB002 Tour, Now He’s Giving Away Photos & Videos From the Run
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to our podcast, where we dive into the latest trends and news in music. I'm your host, and today we're talking about Fred again.., the producer who's been making waves with his innovative approach to live shows and fan engagement.
[Soft music continues in the background]
Host: You might remember Fred's 2025/26 USB002 tour, which was part of a growing trend of phone-free shows. The idea was to encourage attendees to put away their devices and just be present for the performance. And now, two months after the tour ended, Fred and his team are sharing a massive collection of photos, videos, and working files from the tour, all for free.
[Sound effects: A quick clip of a zip file opening]
Host: This drop includes everything from photos of Fred and fans, to slo-mo videos, and even imagery of the tour's large-scale fabric installation. And the best part? Fans are encouraged to download, edit, and get creative with the content. The team behind the project is envisioning new tour posters, videos, and other ephemera.
[Sound effects: A quick clip of a camera shutter]
Host: The USB002 tour was a dance world phenomenon, with Fred announcing each show location just a day in advance, and releasing new music in conjunction with each performance. The tour featured special guests like Four Tet, Skream, and even Daft Punk's Thomas Bangalter, who joined Fred for a b2b set at the final show in London.
[Sound effects: A quick clip of a crowd cheering]
Host: That final show was a memorable one, with Fred calling it "the greatest show of my life." And now, fans can relive the magic of the USB002 tour by accessing the exclusive files. So, what are you waiting for? Check out the link in our show notes to get creative with Fred's tour content.
[Outro music plays]
Host: Thanks for tuning in to our podcast. Join us next time for more updates on the music world.
